## Session — [today’s date]
Goal: Add or refresh **baseline** Cursor rules for **MovieList** (React Native CLI, programme Phase 2 app). Create/update **`.mdc`** files under **`.cursor/rules/`** with YAML frontmatter (`description`, `globs` OR `alwaysApply: true`).

Context: @docs/PSD-Architecture.md 

### Baseline content to enforce

**Global (`movielist-project.mdc`, `alwaysApply: true`)**  
- Prescribed stack: RN CLI (**not Expo**), TS **strict**, **React Navigation v6** (tabs + nested stacks), **Zustand** only for global state, **Axios** only via **`src/api/client.ts`** (never `import axios` elsewhere), **AsyncStorage** for persisted watchlist, **`StyleSheet.create` only**, **Manrope + Inter** via theme, remote data only via **`src/hooks/`** (screens under `src/screens/**` do not call TMDB).  
- **Prohibited:** NativeWind / Styled Components / CSS-in-JS, Redux/MobX, UI kits (Paper, Elements), nav libraries other than RN v6, **hardcoded API keys/tokens**.  
- **Env:** `react-native-dotenv`, **`.env`** gitignored, Bearer only from env in **`client.ts`**.  
- **Hooks:** `{ data, loading, error, refetch }` for data hooks.  
- **Parallel:** `Promise.allSettled` for independent parallel sections (e.g. detail).  
- **Null-safety:** poster/backdrop/runtime/rating/empty arrays handled defensively.  
- **Theme:** colours + spacing only from `src/theme/colors.ts` and `spacing.ts`; **no-line** rule (no 1px layout borders); **no pure `#FFFFFF`** for text.  
- **TS:** no `any`; API types in `src/api/types.ts`; navigation params in `src/navigation/types.ts`.  
- **Folder:** standard `src/` layout: `api/`, `components/`, `hooks/`, `navigation/`, `screens/`, `store/`, `theme/`, `utils/` — do not invent a parallel structure.

**Scoped files (`globs`, `alwaysApply: false`)**  
- **`api.mdc`** — `src/api/**/*.ts`: single client, interceptors, Bearer from env, error shape, one network retry (not 4xx/5xx), `movies.ts` + null-safe `image.ts`.  
- **`hooks.mdc`** — `src/hooks/**/*.ts`: UseQueryResult; search debounce **400ms** with **`useRef` + `clearTimeout`**; cancel stale search requests; no navigation inside hooks.  
- **`store.mdc`** — `src/store/**/*.ts`: Zustand persist + **`hydrated`**; watchlist UI/badge only after hydration; spec watchlist item fields.  
- **`theming.mdc`** — theme + components: typography tokens; Cinematic Curator palette.  
- **`navigation.mdc`** — navigation + screens: typed params; stack-per-tab Detail; pass ids not full objects.  
- **`components.mdc`** — `src/components/**`: presentational; no remote fetch in dumb components; FlatList for long lists; no new list libraries without approval.  
- **`loading-and-errors.mdc`** — screens + components: error boundaries + Try again → hook **`refetch`**; skeletons + ~**1.5s** shimmer; shape-matched skeletons.  
- **`code-quality.mdc`** — `src/**`: defensive null UI, file size, imports.  
- **`performance.mdc`** — components + screens: memo/useCallback/useMemo where it matters.

### Output

- List each **`.mdc`** path created or updated.  
- Keep files focused (~**50 lines** rule body per file where possible).  
- Use **MovieList** in descriptions.

If baseline files already exist, **update in place** — merge missing bullets only; no duplicate files.

## Session — April 14, 2026

Baseline Cursor rules for **MovieList** (React Native CLI, Phase 2) are in place under `.cursor/rules/`, aligned with `docs/PSD-Architecture.md`.

### Created or updated `.mdc` paths

| File | Frontmatter |
|------|-------------|
| `.cursor/rules/movielist-project.mdc` | `alwaysApply: true` — global stack, prohibitions, env, hooks shape, `Promise.allSettled`, null-safety, theme, TS, folder layout |
| `.cursor/rules/api.mdc` | `globs: src/api/**/*.ts` — single client, interceptors, Bearer, error shape, one network retry, `movies.ts` + `src/utils/image.ts` pairing |
| `.cursor/rules/hooks.mdc` | `globs: src/hooks/**/*.ts` — `UseQueryResult`, 400ms debounce with `useRef` + `clearTimeout`, stale search cancellation, no navigation in hooks |
| `.cursor/rules/store.mdc` | `globs: src/store/**/*.ts` — Zustand persist, `hydrated`, UI gate, `WatchlistItem` fields |
| `.cursor/rules/theming.mdc` | `globs: src/theme/**/*`, `src/components/**/*` — Cinematic Curator, typography tokens, spacing, no-line, no `#FFFFFF` text |
| `.cursor/rules/navigation.mdc` | `globs: src/navigation/**/*`, `src/screens/**/*` — typed params, stack-per-tab Detail, ids not objects, screens use hooks only |
| `.cursor/rules/components.mdc` | `globs: src/components/**/*` — presentational, no remote fetch in dumb components, `FlatList`, no new list libs without approval |
| `.cursor/rules/loading-and-errors.mdc` | `globs: src/screens/**/*`, `src/components/**/*` — error boundaries, Try again → `refetch`, skeletons, ~1.5s shimmer, shape-matched skeletons |
| `.cursor/rules/code-quality.mdc` | `globs: src/**/*` — defensive null UI, strict TS, import policy, file size / split guidance |
| `.cursor/rules/performance.mdc` | `globs: src/components/**/*`, `src/screens/**/*` — `memo` / `useCallback` / `useMemo` where it matters, list/image notes |

There were **no existing** `.mdc` files; everything was **added** (no merges). Rule bodies are kept short (~50 lines or less each). **`image.ts`** is documented under **`src/utils/`** per the architecture doc, while **`api.mdc`** stays scoped to `src/api/**/*.ts` and still calls out how **`movies.ts`** and **`image.ts`** work together.

**Tests:** Not applicable (documentation-only rules).

## Session — April 14, 2026

### 1–2. Project location and init

The **MovieList** app is already present at **`/Users/aryansingh/Desktop/Task2/MovieList`** (React Native CLI + TypeScript: `package.json`, `App.tsx`, `ios/`, `android/`). Running **`npx @react-native-community/cli init MovieList`** again **inside** that folder would create a nested **`MovieList/MovieList`** and clash with your existing **`docs/`**, **`.cursor/`**, **`resources/`**, etc., so **no second init** was run.

To create a **fresh** project elsewhere (only if you use an empty directory):

```bash
cd /path/to/parent
npx @react-native-community/cli init MovieList --template react-native-template-typescript
```

### 3. Commands to run the default app

From the project root **`/Users/aryansingh/Desktop/Task2/MovieList`**:

**Metro (one terminal, required for JS bundle):**

```bash
cd /Users/aryansingh/Desktop/Task2/MovieList
npm start
```

**iOS Simulator (second terminal; boot a simulator or let CLI pick one):**

```bash
cd /Users/aryansingh/Desktop/Task2/MovieList
export LANG=en_US.UTF-8
export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8
npx react-native run-ios
```

**Android Emulator (second terminal; start an AVD or let CLI launch one):**

```bash
cd /Users/aryansingh/Desktop/Task2/MovieList
npx react-native run-android
```

Shortcuts (same as `package.json` scripts):

```bash
npm run ios
npm run android
```

### 4. Troubleshooting done here

| Issue | What we did |
|--------|-------------|
| **CocoaPods** `Unicode Normalization not appropriate for ASCII-8BIT` | Ran **`export LANG=en_US.UTF-8`** and **`export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8`**, then **`cd ios && bundle exec pod install`**. Consider adding those exports to your shell profile so **`pod install`** stays reliable. |
| **Gradle** | First run downloaded Gradle **9.3.1** and completed successfully; no project edits. |

### Verification

- **iOS:** `npx react-native run-ios --no-packager` — **build succeeded** and app **launched** on the booted simulator (**iPhone 13 mini**).
- **Android:** `npx react-native run-android --no-packager` — **BUILD SUCCESSFUL**, APK installed on **Medium_Phone_API_36.0** emulator, **MainActivity** started.

**Deliverable:** Default template app builds and runs on **both** iOS simulator and Android emulator; no dotenv, custom `src/` layout, API, Zustand, or feature work was added. For day-to-day use, keep **Metro** running (`npm start`) while using **`run-ios`** / **`run-android`** unless you pass **`--no-packager`** with Metro already up.

---

_**User**_

## Session — 2026-04-14
Goal: PSD-Architecture §16 Task 2 — add environment-variable support for MovieList: dependencies, `react-native-dotenv`, `.env` + `.env.example`, and TypeScript types for `@env`.

@docs/PSD-Architecture.md 

**Project root:** work inside **`MovieList/`** (the React Native app created in Task 1). If the workspace root is the parent folder, use paths relative to `MovieList/`.

Do **only** Task 2:

1. Install and configure **`react-native-dotenv`** (Babel plugin) so variables can be imported in TypeScript (e.g. `import { TMDB_ACCESS_TOKEN } from '@env'`).
2. Ensure **`.env`** exists at the **MovieList** project root with these keys (values are placeholders on my machine; I will fill real secrets locally):
   - `TMDB_BASE_URL=https://api.themoviedb.org/3`
   - `TMDB_IMAGE_BASE_URL=https://image.tmdb.org/t/p`
   - `TMDB_ACCESS_TOKEN=your_bearer_token_here`
3. Add **`.env.example`** with the **same keys** and **placeholder** values only — safe to commit.
4. Ensure **`.gitignore`** includes **`.env`** so it is never committed.
5. Add **TypeScript declarations** for the `@env` module (e.g. `env.d.ts` or equivalent) so `TMDB_*` imports are typed and `strict` TS does not break on `any` env imports.

**Out of scope for this session:** implementing **`src/api/client.ts`** beyond a stub if needed for type-checking, full **`src/`** tree (Task 3), **`client.ts`** interceptors/retry (Task 5), navigation, Zustand, feature code, or Home/PSD feature work.

**Deliverable:** app still builds; `@env` imports type-check; `.env` ignored; `.env.example` committed pattern documented in a short note if helpful.

## Session — 2026-04-14 (Task 2)

### What changed

1. **`react-native-dotenv`** (`^3.4.11` in `devDependencies`) — Babel injects values from `.env` for `import { … } from '@env'`.

2. **`babel.config.js`** — Wrapped in `api.cache(true)` and added plugin **`module:react-native-dotenv`** with `moduleName: '@env'`, `path: '.env'`, `allowUndefined: true`.

3. **`.env`** (project root, local placeholders — **gitignored**):
   - `TMDB_BASE_URL`, `TMDB_IMAGE_BASE_URL`, `TMDB_ACCESS_TOKEN` as specified.

4. **`.env.example`** — Same keys and placeholder values, safe to commit.

5. **`.gitignore`** — Entry **`.env`** so secrets are not committed.

6. **`dotenv.d.ts`** — Declares module `'@env'` with typed `TMDB_*` exports.  
   **Note:** It is intentionally named **`dotenv.d.ts`**, not `env.d.ts`, because **`env.ts` + `env.d.ts` in the same folder are merged by TypeScript**, so `declare module '@env'` in `env.d.ts` never applied.

7. **`tsconfig.json`** — `"include"` extended with **`**/*.d.ts`** so ambient declarations are part of the program.

8. **`env.ts`** — Thin re-exports from `@env` so strict `tsc` actually resolves `@env` (and Task 5 can import from here or from `@env` directly).

9. **`README.md`** — Short “Environment variables (TMDB)” section: copy `.env.example` → `.env`, `.env` ignored, `dotenv.d.ts`, Metro `--reset-cache` hint.

### Files touched

| Path | Role |
|------|------|
| `package.json` / `package-lock.json` | `react-native-dotenv` |
| `babel.config.js` | Babel plugin |
| `.env` | Local env (ignored by git) |
| `.env.example` | Committed template |
| `.gitignore` | Ignore `.env` |
| `dotenv.d.ts` | `@env` typings |
| `env.ts` | Typed re-exports / compile check |
| `tsconfig.json` | Include `**/*.d.ts` |
| `README.md` | Env setup note |

### Verification

- `npx tsc --noEmit` — **passes**
- `npm test` — **passes**
- `npm run lint` — **passes**
- `git check-ignore -v .env` — **`.env` is ignored**

### Follow-up for you

- Replace `your_bearer_token_here` in **`.env`** with your real TMDB Bearer token (never commit).
- After env/Babel changes, restart Metro with **`npm start -- --reset-cache`** once if values look stale.

---

_**User**_

## Session — [2026-04-14]
Goal: PSD-Architecture §16 Task 3 — create the **`src/`** directory layout and **stub files**; turn on **TypeScript `strict`** mode. **No** product UI, **no** styling work, **no** data or navigation logic.

@docs/PSD-Architecture.md 

**Work in:** `MovieList/` (the React Native app root).

---

### 1. TypeScript

- In `tsconfig.json`, set **`compilerOptions.strict`** to **`true`**.
- Fix only the type errors needed for the existing template + new stubs to compile.

---

### 2. Folder and file layout

Create under **`src/`** the same structure as the PSD, including at minimum:

- `api/client.ts`, `api/movies.ts`, `api/types.ts`
- `components/common/` (and `.gitkeep` or empty placeholder if required)
- `hooks/useHome.ts`, `hooks/useSearch.ts`, `hooks/useMovieDetail.ts`
- `navigation/RootNavigator.tsx`, `navigation/types.ts`
- `screens/` — `HomeScreen.tsx`, `SearchScreen.tsx`, `DetailScreen.tsx`, `WatchlistScreen.tsx`, `ProfileScreen.tsx`
- `store/watchlistStore.ts`
- `theme/colors.ts`, `theme/typography.ts`, `theme/spacing.ts`
- `utils/image.ts`

---

### 3. Stub rules (important)

- **Stubs only:** minimal valid TypeScript so files are not empty where the toolchain requires exports. **No** HTTP calls, **no** Axios setup, **no** Zustand `persist` / real store logic, **no** `useEffect` + fetch in hooks.
- **Screens:** do **not** build layouts. If a `.tsx` file must export a component, export one that returns **`null`** — **no** `StyleSheet`, **no** tokens, **no** lists.
- **Do not** import these screens from **`App.tsx`** and **do not** replace the template root UI. After this task, the app should still show the **default React Native welcome screen**.

---

### 4. Out of scope

- Task 4 (full theme tokens, real `image.ts`), Task 5 (`client.ts` / `movies.ts`), Task 6–9 (navigation, store, hooks wiring, app entry integration), any PSD feature screens.

---

### 5. Deliverable

- `src/` tree matches the PSD; **`strict: true`**; project **builds**; **`App.tsx` unchanged** from a user-visible perspective (still default RN screen); no feature logic added.

---

### Design source (embedded — implement exactly)

#### Colours — `src/theme/colors.ts`

Export these keys and hex/rgba values (names must match for later PSD work):

- **Surfaces:**  
  `surface` `#131313`  
  `surface_container_lowest` `#0E0E0E`  
  `surface_container_low` `#1C1B1B`  
  `surface_container` `#232323`  
  `surface_container_high` `#2A2A2A`  
  `surface_container_highest` `#353534`  
  `surface_bright` `#3A3939`

- **Primary accent:**  
  `primary` `#FFB3AE`  
  `primary_container` `#FF5351`  
  `secondary_container` `#822625`

- **Text:**  
  `on_surface` `#E5E2E1` (primary text — never pure white)  
  `on_surface_variant` `#E4BDBA`

- **Utility:**  
  `outline_variant` `rgba(255,255,255,0.15)` (ghost borders / accessibility only)

**Rules:** No hardcoded hex outside this file later. No-line rule: no solid 1px borders for layout — spacing + background only. Never `#FFFFFF` for text.

#### Primary gradient (for CTAs — export as constants or small helper)

- Colours: `['#FFB3AE', '#FF5351']`  
- `start: { x: 0, y: 0 }` `end: { x: 1, y: 1 }`  
- (Actual `LinearGradient` usage comes when you build UI; this task can export the array + points only.)

#### Tab bar glass (constants for later)

- `backgroundColor`: `rgba(35, 35, 35, 0.70)`  
- Blur: `@react-native-community/blur`, `blurAmount: 20` (install only if needed for this task — prefer **constants only** if packages not added yet).

#### Typography — `src/theme/typography.ts`

Use **Manrope** for display/headlines/title-lg; **Inter** for title-sm, body-md, label-sm.

| Token | Font | Size | Weight | Letter spacing |
|-------|------|------|--------|----------------|
| display-lg | Manrope | 56 | 800 | -0.02em |
| display-md | Manrope | 40 | 800 | -0.02em |
| headline-md | Manrope | 28 | 700 | -0.01em |
| title-lg | Manrope | 20 | 600 | 0 |
| title-sm | Inter | 14 | 600 | 0 |
| body-md | Inter | 14 | 400 | 0 |
| label-sm | Inter | 12 | 400 | 0 |

Wire font loading per project setup (`react-native-google-fonts` or existing pattern). If fonts are not loaded in this task, export numeric/text styles anyway and add a TODO for font family hookup.

#### Spacing — `src/theme/spacing.ts`

The programme requires a **spacing scale** in one place (spec does not list every pixel). Define a **small consistent scale** used across the app, e.g. base **4** and tokens like `xs/sm/md/lg/xl/xxl` mapping to **4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32** (add **40**, **56** if useful for typography alignment). **No** magic numbers in components later — only these tokens.

#### Content card reference (constants only)

- Portrait aspect **2:3**; outer radius **16**; inner **12** (export as theme constants).

#### Skeleton / shimmer (document in theme or comment)

- Base: `surface_container_high`; shimmer sweep toward `surface_bright`; loop ~**1.5s** (implementation can be a later task — this session: **document** token usage in comments or export animation duration constant).

- Sizes: **`w185`** (cast/small), **`w342`** (cards), **`w780`** (detail backdrop) — export as named constants.
- **If `path` is `null` or empty, return `null`** — never return a broken URL string.

## Session — [2026-04-14]
Goal: PSD-Architecture §16 Task 5 — implement **`src/api/client.ts`** (Axios + interceptors + retry), extend **`src/api/types.ts`** with shared/error starter types, and **`src/api/movies.ts`** with at most **one smoke** request to prove auth + interceptors (no Home/Search feature endpoints yet).

@docs/PSD-Architecture.md 

**Work in:** `MovieList/`

**Assume Task 2 is done:** `react-native-dotenv`, `.env` with `TMDB_BASE_URL`, `TMDB_ACCESS_TOKEN`, `TMDB_IMAGE_BASE_URL`, and typed `@env` imports.

---

### 1. `src/api/client.ts`

- Single **`axios.create`** with **base URL** from env (`TMDB_BASE_URL`).
- **Request interceptor:** set **`Authorization: Bearer <TMDB_ACCESS_TOKEN>`** from env — not hardcoded, not repeated per call elsewhere.
- **Response interceptor:** normalize failures to a **stable shape** (e.g. `{ message: string, status?: number }` or equivalent) for callers.
- **Retry:** at most **one** automatic retry on **network** errors (timeout, no connection) — **do not** retry on HTTP **4xx/5xx** responses.
- **Only this file** imports the `axios` package for app HTTP (per project rules).

---

### 2. `src/api/types.ts`

- Shared **API error** / normalized error type used by interceptors and hooks later.
- Optional: minimal **pagination** helper types (`page`, `total_pages`) if useful.
- **Do not** add full TMDB DTOs for every endpoint yet — those grow when you implement **`PSD-Home`** / feature work.

---

### 3. `src/api/movies.ts`

- Import **only** the shared **`client`** from `./client` (no raw `axios`).
- Add **either:**
  - **one smoke function** (e.g. `getConfiguration` or a minimal `GET` the TMDB allows) that proves **Bearer** works, **or**
  - a clearly marked **TODO** plus one real minimal call — goal is **proof the pipeline works**, not feature code.
- **No** `fetchTrending`, `searchMovies`, credits, similar, etc. yet — those belong to feature tasks.

---

### Out of scope

- Task 6 (`navigation/types` + `RootNavigator` + placeholder screens wiring), Task 7 (watchlist store), Task 8–9 (hooks + `App` integration), **`PSD-Home`** endpoint functions, UI.

---

### Deliverable

- App **builds**; a **smoke** API call can be invoked from a temporary dev-only path or commented test — or document how you verified (e.g. log in Metro); **no** broken imports; **no** secrets in source beyond `@env`.

---
